feed.title: Daily Digest
feed.subtitle: Quote, fact, life hack, fortune cookie, and headlines of the day

entry.title: ‘Players require rest’: Gavaskar questions IPL 2026 final schedule, says GT deserved a fairer deal
entry.content: Sunil Gavaskar has criticized the IPL 2026 final's scheduling, suggesting a postponement due to Gujarat Titans' travel woes. Disruptions delayed their arrival in Ahmedabad, leaving them with less than 24 hours to prepare after an exhausting playoff run. Gavaskar believes a reserve day should have been utilized for a fairer contest.

entry.title: How much money did the Arizona Cardinals spend on UDFAs in 2026?
entry.content: A look at the contract details of the eight rookie free agents the Cardinals signed this year.

entry.title: How Can I Watch The NBA Finals? Schedule, Times And TV Channel
entry.content: The start time, TV channel, and watch guide for the NBA Finals featuring the New York Knicks and San Antonio Spurs. Game 1 is June 3 at 8:30 p.m. ET on ABC.

entry.title: Jose Siri robs Rays of grand slam, saves outfield buffet with remarkable over-the-wall catch
entry.content: Siri's leaping grab saved four runs for the Angles and a nacho station on the other side of the outfield wall.

entry.title: Paul Finebaum calls out ‘stupid people’ covering college football for propping up teams over CFP appearances
entry.content: College football has spent two years convincing itself that the 12-team playoff was the right call, and the sport’s loudest skeptic thinks the coverage that followed has only made the next bad idea easier to sell. Paul Finebaum has been waging a one-man war against expanding the College Football Playoff to 24 teams since the…

entry.title: Manchester City Are Among The Clubs Hoping To Land This Talented Forward: One For The Future?
entry.content: In a recent report, Tipsbladet stated that Manchester City are among the clubs hoping to land Bodo/Glimt striker Mikkel Bro Hansen. It has been revealed that the Mancunian giants are facing competitio...

entry.title: Video shows more of Texas Tech softball, Tennessee handshake line exchange
entry.content: ESPN released video of the handshake line between Texas Tech softball and Tennessee after their Women's College World Series game.

entry.title: Trump praised IBM's 'legend' CEO, government floated a $1B quantum award — is the stock still a 'very nice price'?
entry.content: Trump praised IBM's 'legend' CEO, government floated a $1B quantum award — is the stock still a 'very nice price'?

entry.title: NYC Mayor Mamdani will not attend annual parade honoring Israel
entry.content: He's breaking with a decades-long political custom.

entry.title: 360 Energy Pulse: What mattered this month in energy
entry.content: 360 Energy Pulse: What mattered this month in energy

entry.title: Here are the top candidates for California governor in Tuesday's primary
entry.content: California voters face a crowded ballot with 61 names during Tuesday's primary to replace outgoing Democratic Gov. Gavin Newsom

entry.title: Ole Miss vs. Nebraska baseball box score: Live stats from NCAA Baseball Championship Game 2
entry.content: The Rebels and Huskers fight to advance.

entry.title: USMNT vs. Senegal live score, results, highlights from USA's 2026 World Cup friendly match
entry.content: The Sporting News is tracking live scoring updates and highlights for USA's international friendly match vs. Senegal. Follow for complete results from the first look at USMNT's World Cup roster.

entry.title: VCU vs. East Carolina baseball box score: Live stats from NCAA Baseball championship tournament game
entry.content: The Rams and Pirates face the axe.

entry.title: Wake Forest vs. West Virginia baseball box score: Live stats from NCAA Baseball championship tournament game
entry.content: The Demon Deacons and Mountaineers face elimination.

entry.title: Ibrahima Konate's Anfield departure confirmed by Liverpool
entry.content: The Reds are set to lose their French defender in the coming window.

entry.title: Michigan QB Bryce Underwood raises eyebrows in offseason review from key right-hand man
entry.content: Under 13 weeks remain until the college football season gets underway, which means the Michigan Wolverines are getting closer to unleashing their new look under second-year quarterback Bryce Underwood and new coach Kyle Whittingham. The Wolverines missed the College Football Playoff last season.

entry.title: College baseball on TV today: Full schedule, times, channels, streams for Sunday NCAA regional games
entry.content: The road to the College World Series begins with regionals. Here's when and where to watch every game today.

entry.title: Yankees have a Ryan McMahon problem that might have a $25 million solution
entry.content: This issue might have an unfortunate fix for the Yankees.

entry.title: TechCrunch Mobility: It doesn’t matter that people hate the Ferrari Luce
entry.content: Welcome back to TechCrunch Mobility, your hub for the future of transportation and now, more than ever, how AI is playing a part.

entry.title: The Hedge Fund Veteran Trying to Make His Past Self Obsolete With AI
entry.content: Former short seller Joe O’Donnell makes software for analysts that can perform tasks in hours that used to take him weeks.

entry.title: Former Barclays CEO Jes Staley agrees to July 23 interview about Jeffrey Epstein by Oversight panel
entry.content: Microsoft co-founder Bill Gates is scheduled to be interviewed about his relationship to the sex offender Jeffrey Epstein in June.

entry.title: More than 40 dead in Ebola outbreak in DR Congo and Uganda
entry.content: Over 40 people have died in a growing Ebola outbreak in the Democratic Republic of the Congo and Uganda, where government and international aid organizations are struggling to cope with the spread of the disease

entry.title: WHO calls for community cooperation to contain Ebola outbreak in DRC
entry.content: Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus makes appeal after protests against protocols for handling victims’ bodies in Ituri provinceContaining the Ebola outbreak in the Democratic Republic of Congo requires community cooperation and is “everybody’s business”, the World Health Organization has said.Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, the organisation’s director general, made the plea on Sunday during a visit to eastern Congo where some residents have protested against stringent medical protocols for handling victims’ bodies. Continue reading...

entry.title: Making sense of the debate over AI psychosis
entry.content: On the latest episode of Equity, we debate whether tech CEOs are "uniquely prone to AI psychosis."

entry.title: Graham Platner’s wife ‘angry’ her disclosures of his extramarital sexting were made public
entry.content: The wife of Graham Platner, the presumptive Democratic nominee for Senate in Maine, said she is “really angry” about reports that she had previously told her husband’s campaign he had exchanged sexually explicit texts with other women.“It makes me really angry, disappointed,” Platner’s wife, Amy Gertner, said in a direct-to-camera video released by Platner’s campaign on Saturday night.

entry.title: Trump Interior Secretary Doug Burgum says America's 250th will be "nonpartisan"
entry.content: Trump Interior Secretary Doug Burgum says America's 250th will be "nonpartisan"

entry.title: Meet Hollywood’s new masters of horror: YouTubers
entry.content: A24’s “Backrooms” — from 20-year-old Kane Parsons — broke box office records this weekend, marking the latest example of an indie horror hit helmed by a YouTuber.

entry.title: Black founders raise highest amount of quarterly funding since 2022, but there’s a catch
entry.content: Speaking to TechCrunch, Crunchbase’s head of research Gené Teare, said the factors holding back Black founders include “access to networks, relationships, and early introductions."

entry.title: Death of Congolese man renews scrutiny of race relations in Ireland
entry.content: Yves Sakila died after being restrained by security guards ‘in broad daylight’Irish authorities have agreed to a second postmortem on the body of a Congolese man who died after being restrained by shop security guards on a Dublin street, prompting an outcry and comparisons to the death of George Floyd.A forensic pathologist from England is to conduct an independent postmortem this week on Yves Sakila, 35, an alleged shoplifter who was pursued and pinned to the ground in the city centre on 15 May. The police force, An Garda Síochána, is investigating. Continue reading...

entry.title: Market concentration is creating 'fragility': Only 60% of S&P 500 stocks are above their 200-day average
entry.content: Market concentration is creating 'fragility': Only 60% of S&P 500 stocks are above their 200-day average

entry.title: Mike Pence says GOP ‘lost our way’ after nominating Ken Paxton ‘but Democrats have lost their mind’
entry.content: Former Vice President Mike Pence tells Meet the Press Democrats have “lost their mind” and Republicans can still hold onto their Senate majority, but says the party has “lost our way” after Texas Republicans nominated Ken Paxton for Senate.

entry.title: Women don’t need menopause tea and meno-friendly nighties. They need doctors to take them seriously | Emma Beddington
entry.content: Serious health conditions are being misdiagnosed and pregnancies are missed while the internet swells with terrible advice and meno-products. Enough!Ladies! Are you tired all the time, sweaty and hot, or headachy? Do you have a range of the vague complaints (laziness, hysteria, dissolute habits, general languishing) that would have seen you committed to a 19th-century asylum? Are you lacking in joie de vivre? Maybe you’re perimenopausal!Or maybe you’re not: being tired, hot and over everything are also symptoms of simply being alive in spring 2026. That’s not what the internet wants you to believe, though: last week, experts issued a warning about the deluge of perimenopause and menopause misinformation online and the risks that can pose to women, including unwanted pregnancies and a failure to seek a diagnosis for serious health conditions.Do you have an opinion on the issues raised in this article? If you would like to submit a response of up to 300 words by email to be considered for publication in our letters section, please click here. Continue reading...

entry.title: Experimental pill promises new hope for deadly pancreatic cancer
entry.content: A novel pill helped people with advanced pancreatic cancer live longer, researchers reported Sunday, raising hopes of long-needed better treatments for one of the deadliest types of cancer.

entry.title: What happens in Vega$: steroids, swimmers, and a billion-dollar hustle
entry.content: The Enhanced Games — a singular sporting competition where a majority of the athletes were on performance enhancing drugs — may herald a new business model that the tech industry is ready to embrace.

entry.title: Golf Is Now Cooler and Younger. The Stock Market Has Noticed.
entry.content: The sport is winning over the next generation, opening up a bigger potential market.

entry.title: Nobody Can Agree How to Keep the Sharks Out of South Africa’s New Club Med
entry.content: Scientists and local officials are in a standoff over the best tactics to ensure high-paying guests at the luxury resort don’t become chum.

entry.title: Spurs advance to NBA Finals, ousting reigning champion Thunder
entry.content: For the eighth consecutive year, the NBA will have a new champion

entry.title: All missing victims recovered in Washington paper mill explosion
entry.content: The remains of all missing victims in a Washington state paper mill explosion have been recovered, officials announced Saturday.“Today, on day five of this incident, I can share that we have recovered the ninth and final missing employee of this incident,” Longview Fire Chief Brad Hannig said in a Saturday news conference.

entry.title: Trump Wants Minerals, Health Data for Aid. African Nations Are Pushing Back.
entry.content: Governments bridle at U.S. demands for private medical data and, in some cases, access to minerals.

entry.title: The Home-Insurance Coin Flip: Nearly Half of Claims Result in Zero Payout
entry.content: Home insurers pitch policies as a financial peace-of-mind safety net, but in a disaster customers can find the apparent guarantee of compensation evaporates.

entry.title: The wild tale of Audi Crooks’ biggest fan, online trolls, and a Boston Globe writer’s face
entry.content: There has never been a better time for online trolls, and that’s saying something, given the internet’s history. Thanks to the decimation of what little safeguards we had on social media platforms like X and Facebook, coupled with living in an era where the President of the United States spends his days posting memes and…

entry.title: Former Washington football OL named top underrated transfer
entry.content: One of Washington's former key pieces of depth along the offensive line looks to be among the nation's most underrated transfers at his new home.

entry.title: How to live stream Stephanie Han vs Holly Holm: Boxing, TV channel
entry.content: Holly Holm returns to the ring on Saturday for her second showdown against Stephanie Han this year, as the WBA lightweight title is once again put on the line. How to Watch Stephanie Han vs Holly Holm UFC royalty Holly…

entry.title: Fortune Cookie of the Day
entry.content:
Be on the alert to recognize your prime at whatever time of your life it may occur.
Lucky Numbers: 88, 50, 24, 20, 24, 6

entry.title: Life Hack of the Day
entry.content: Wrap your cheese in parchment paper.

entry.title: Useless Fact of the Day
entry.content: The first television shows to have the characters take bathroom breaks were "All in the Family" and "Married with Children."

entry.title: Quote of the Day — Spencer Johnson
entry.content: “In a world that is constantly changing, it is to our advantage to learn how to adapt and enjoy something better.” — Spencer Johnson

entry.title: St. Xavier tennis locks up 2026 coaches team tournament title
entry.content: St. Xavier tennis followed up on an OHSAA doubles championship with its first Ohio Tennis Coaches Association team tournament title since 2009.

entry.title: St. Xavier tennis locks up 2026 coaches team tournament title
entry.content: St. Xavier tennis followed up on an OHSAA doubles championship with its first Ohio Tennis Coaches Association team tournament title since 2009.

entry.title: Wade Meckler hits his first grand slam to help the Angels rout the Rays 14-3
entry.content: Wade Meckler hit his first grand slam in the majors for the first of Los Angeles' four homers in the Angels' 14-3 victory over the Tampa Bay Rays on Saturday. Meckler connected off Drew Rasmussen (4-2) in the first inning. Mike Trout hit his 14th homer of the season in the fifth and Jo Adell and Oswald Peraza had back-to-back shots in a seven-run ninth.

entry.title: Former LIV Golf winner explains why he left and states desire to become best player on the PGA Tour
entry.content: LIV Golf faces an extremely uncertain future right now, with Saudi Arabia’s PIF set to pull their funding from the league at the end of this season. Back in June 2022, LIV Golf burst onto the scene and threatened to compete directly with the PGA Tour.

entry.title: Orioles score 5 runs in 9th to beat Blue Jays 6-5
entry.content: BALTIMORE — It’s never too late to find a groove. That was the Baltimore Orioles’ lesson Saturday against the Toronto Blue Jays. After struggling to bring runners home for the first two games and most of the third of this week’s series, Baltimore finally found the late-inning magic it had been missing. After leaving six runners on base and grounding into more double plays (four) than hits ...

entry.title: Trump to hold rally at ‘Great America State Fair’ after artists back out
entry.content: President Trump announced he will be headlining the opening ceremony for the Great American State Fair in June as part of the United States’ 250th-birthday celebrations in Washington. It comes after multiple recording artists pulled out of a series of concerts meant to take place during the fair, scheduled for June 24 to July 10 on Washington’s National Mall.

entry.title: War of words extends after Texas Tech, Tennessee softball WCWS game
entry.content: Texas Tech softball's Taylor Pannell said Tennessee head coach Karen Weekly told her she "made a mistake" transferring. Weekly denies the claim.

entry.title: Baker's regional hurdles title part of big day for Shelby Whippets boys
entry.content: Shelby's Gavin Baker won the Division III regional championship in the 110-meter hurdles as part of a big day for the Whippets.

entry.title: 💥The other side of the Champions League: incidents erupt across Paris
entry.content: As expected, unfortunately, Paris is descending into chaos after PSG won the second Champions League in its history.So far, there have been more than 80 arrests by police and one person injured in a s...

entry.title: BKFC 90 Highlights! Darren Till Survives Early Knockdown Scare, Delivers Bareknuckle KO
entry.content: Darren Till fought through an early scare to deliver a memorable knockout finish in his bareknuckle boxing debut earlier tonight (Sat., May 30, 2026) at BKFC 90 from inside Utilita Arena in Birmingham, England, as the former UFC welterweight title challenger stopped Aaron Chalmers with a nasty second-round knockout. Despite not serving as the event’s headliner, […]

entry.title: Tennessee softball takes down Texas Tech to advance to semifinals
entry.content: The Tennessee softball team had a huge game on tap for Saturday. After taking down the Texas Longhorns in the Women’s College World Series on Thursday, the team was due to take on Texas Tech on Saturday. The Red Raiders were the runner-up in 2025, and they’ve received plenty of attention over the year for […]

entry.title: 'We will come again' - fan reaction to Champions League final defeat
entry.content: Pablo: So many people were saying PSG would wipe the floor with us. David: It may be a loss in a Champions League final, but the season overall has been a success with winning the league. People might say Arsenal bottled it but, let's be honest, PSG are a very good side.

entry.title: Dodgers to miss three-time Silver Slugger after hamstring injury
entry.content: The Dodgers will be without Teoscar Hernandez for some time after his hamstring injury.

entry.title: Gleyber Torres starts injury rehab assignment with Triple-A Toledo
entry.content: Both Gleyber Torres and Kerry Carpenter are rehabbing in Triple-A Toledo, though Carpenter seems likely to return to the Detroit Tigers before Torres.

entry.title: Dueling protests face off at New Jersey ICE detention center over detainee conditions
entry.content: Tensions rose at a Newark, New Jersey, immigration detention center on Saturday as a group of pro-ICE protesters faced off with demonstrators who have maintained a presence outside the facility for more than a week in support of detainees who they say are enduring inhumane conditions inside. NBC News’ Valerie Castro reports.

entry.title: Louisiana’s Malan Potgieter reaches 91 straight holes without bogey at NCAA Championship
entry.content: Louisiana golfer Malan Potgieter set what's believed to be a collegiate record, sitting at 91 straight holes without a bogey on the scorecard.

entry.title: Darren Till demolishes Aaron Chalmers with brutal one-punch knockout after surviving knockdown in BKFC debut
entry.content: Darren Till says he’s ready for anybody and everybody after winning his BKFC debut

entry.title: Glasner considered for AC Milan job - Sunday's gossip
entry.content: Oliver Glasner considered for AC Milan job, while Liverpool negotiate with Inter Milan on a price for Curtis Jones, plus more.

entry.title: French Open: Frances Tiafoe storms back to best Jaime Faria after going down early
entry.content: Tempers boiled over after a successful comeback from Tiafoe, who went down 2-0 to start the game.

entry.title: Arkansas vs. Kansas baseball box score: Live stats from NCAA Baseball Championship Game 2
entry.content: The Hogs and Jayhawks battle in Lawrence on Saturday night.

entry.title: Blue Jays' Charles McAdoo has an incredible Star Wars passion that overlaps with his MLB story
entry.content: His MLB debut was even more special than it seemed.

entry.title: Virginia Tech vs UCLA baseball live box score: Live stats from NCAA Baseball Championship Game
entry.content: Bruins try to survive at home in a rare situation.

entry.title: Why crucial penalty miss was 'cruel blow' for Arsenal standout Gabriel
entry.content: Gabriel's first penalty for Arsenal ends in heartache as his shootout miss hands Paris St-Germain a second successive Champions League title.

entry.title: Moulton to take on incumbent Markey in Massachusetts Democratic Senate primary
entry.content: U.S. Rep. Seth Moulton, a moderate Massachusetts Democrat, secured enough delegate support Saturday to appear on the state's primary ballot as he challenges incumbent Sen. Ed Markey.

entry.title: SoftBank says it will invest up to €75 billion to build French data centers
entry.content: The goal, the firm said, is to develop and operate up to 5 gigawatts of additional data center capacity.

entry.title: Trump to kick off Great American State Fair after several musicians cancel
entry.content: Freedom 250, the organization behind the event, said Saturday that that President Trump will kick off the event on June 24 in an opening ceremony.

entry.title: This week on "Sunday Morning" (May 31)
entry.content: A look at the features for this week's broadcast of the Emmy-winning program, hosted by Jane Pauley.

entry.title: This weekend’s two biggest movies were both directed by YouTubers
entry.content: The YouTube-to-prestige-horror pipeline is looking very strong.

entry.title: Trump decision on Iran deal yet to come as Hegseth talks negotiations
entry.content: President Trump held a meeting with key advisers on Friday to hammer out a "final determination" on a potential deal with Iran, but no word has come on a decision.

entry.title: Meteor explodes off coast of Massachusetts, causing loud boom
entry.content: According to preliminary reports submitted to the American Meteor Society, dozens of people across the Northeast reported seeing the fireball around 2 p.m. ET Saturday.

entry.title: Platner's wife told campaign about sexually explicit texts he sent other women
entry.content: The wife of Democratic Maine Senate candidate Graham Platner told his campaign in 2025 about sexual messages he had sent to other women.

entry.title: Dueling protests face off at New Jersey ICE detention center over detainee conditions
entry.content: Tensions rose at a Newark, New Jersey, immigration detention center on Saturday as a group of pro-ICE protesters faced off with demonstrators who have maintained a presence outside the facility for more than a week in support of detainees who they say are enduring inhumane conditions inside

entry.title: Why NVDY Shareholders Miss Half of NVIDIA’s Explosive Moves in Strong Months
entry.content: Why NVDY Shareholders Miss Half of NVIDIA’s Explosive Moves in Strong Months

entry.title: I Think This Is the Most Misunderstood Tech Stock on the Market Right Now -- and That's Exactly Why I'm Buying
entry.content: I Think This Is the Most Misunderstood Tech Stock on the Market Right Now -- and That's Exactly Why I'm Buying

entry.title: Cancer jab can eradicate entire tumours in patients, trial shows
entry.content: Jab brought ‘unprecedentedly strong responses’ in patients whose disease had become resistant to chemotherapy and immunotherapyDoctors have hailed “unprecedented” trial results that show a triple-action cancer jab can eradicate entire tumours in patients.In an international trial spanning 11 countries, the injection was offered to patients whose cancer had spread or come back and whose disease had failed to respond to other treatments. Continue reading...

entry.title: Oscar-winning 'Star Wars' editor Marcia Lucas has died
entry.content: Marcia Lucas, who edited 'Star Wars' and 'Return of the Jedi,' has died at 80.

entry.title: DOJ reportedly subpoenas X, Reddit for data on users critical of immigration efforts
entry.content: The Justice Department has reportedly issued subpoenas to compel Reddit and X to give federal prosecutors the names, addresses and banking details of users who have criticized the government's deportation efforts.

entry.title: Coeur Mining Inc. (CDE) A Stock that Could 10x by 2030 While Returning Shareholder Value
entry.content: Coeur Mining Inc. (CDE) A Stock that Could 10x by 2030 While Returning Shareholder Value

entry.title: Here’s Why Zoetis (ZTS) Is one of the Best Wide Moat Stocks to Buy According to Wall Street Analysts
entry.content: Here’s Why Zoetis (ZTS) Is one of the Best Wide Moat Stocks to Buy According to Wall Street Analysts

entry.title: Robust Recurring Revenue Affirms Trimble Inc. (TRMB) as a Stock That Could 10x by 2030
entry.content: Robust Recurring Revenue Affirms Trimble Inc. (TRMB) as a Stock That Could 10x by 2030

entry.title: NASA readies the X-59 for its first supersonic flight, SpaceX's Starship grounded and more science stories
entry.content: This week's science news.

entry.title: How Dolly Parton Built the Tourism Empire of Her Dreams
entry.content: After the success of Dollywood, the country music superstar plans to add hotels, entertainment venues and even themed gas stations.

entry.title: The groupthink boom: what three top VCs really think about the AI frenzy
entry.content: "If you're 22 years old in San Francisco and building something in AI, there may be a seed term sheet in your inbox — but if you're 19, oh my God, this means you're really good; you might already have a Series A [offer]," said one, half-kiddingly.

entry.title: Vingegaard storms to Piancavallo win to all but seal Giro d’Italia title
entry.content: One down, one to go. Jonas Vingegaard all but won the Giro d’Italia on Saturday and his attention will soon turn to the Tour de France as he attempts to become the ninth male cyclist to complete the Giro-Tour double. Vingegaard wrapped up the first part in style, soloing to victory atop Piancavallo at the end of the 20th and penultimate stage to extend his overall lead to more than five minutes from Felix Gall.

entry.title: Shankland bags a brace as Scotland hit back to beat 10-man Curacao
entry.content: Lawrence Shankland staked his claim for a World Cup start with a brace in Scotland’s 4-1 friendly win against 10-man Curacao on Saturday. Steve Clarke utilised his squad as promised with several regulars rested but the visitors, managed by 78-year-old former Rangers boss Dick Advocaat, took the lead in the 17th minute through a fine Tahith Chong goal.

entry.title: MLB had 4 walk-off home runs in one night, thanks to the Mets, Pirates, White Sox and Rockies
entry.content: It's hard to have more exciting finishes than these ones.

entry.title: Saracens beat Harlequins to boost play-off hopes
entry.content: Saracens beat Harlequins to boost their Prem play-off hopes and give departing director of rugby Mark McCall a winning farewell at the StoneX Stadium.

entry.title: Roland Garros to make change after controversial injury trend at French Open
entry.content: French Open to make changes to court advertising following complaints from Britain’s Katie Boulter and Iga Swiatek

entry.title: Florida vying for coveted EDGE Cahron Wheeler as OV season underway
entry.content: Florida football continues pursuing four-star EDGE Cahron Wheeler as official visit season ramps up.

entry.title: Brian Flores claims Dolphins are trying to force him to repay earned income
entry.content: The recent amendment to the Brian Flores civil complaint adds new allegations regarding a "culture of retaliation," based on his decision to assert his legal rights in court.

entry.title: Bloom-Carroll and Liberty Union punch ticket to state tournament
entry.content: Bloom Carroll and Liberty Union softball teams won regional titles and are heading to the state tournament in Akron.

entry.title: The New Students at This Liberal Arts College Are in Their 80s
entry.content: Baby boomers and the silent generation are attending classes at Goucher, part of a partnership meant to offset a steep decline in enrollment
